summary: Completed testing of push notification feature. All 7 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified - Security Settings > Notifications tab displays correctly with push notification toggle and proper state handling.
passed_tests: GET /api/push/vapid-public-key - Returns VAPID public key correctly (87 chars)
POST /api/push/subscribe - Subscribes user to push notifications with valid auth
POST /api/push/subscribe - Rejects invalid subscription data (422 validation error)
DELETE /api/push/unsubscribe - Unsubscribes user from push notifications
Subscription upsert - No duplicate entries when subscribing same endpoint twice
Security Settings dialog opens via nav-security button
Notifications tab visible in Security Settings (3 tabs: Auth, Notifications, Encryption)
Push Notifications section displays with toggle switch
Notifications Blocked warning shows correctly (expected in headless browser)
Mobile App Experience info section displays properly
Service worker has push event handler at line 128
critical_code_review_comments: Push notification implementation looks solid - VAPID keys are configured correctly in backend/.env
Service worker handles push events with proper notification options (vibrate, icon, badge, actions)
NotificationSettings component correctly checks isPushSupported and handles permission states
SecuritySettings has proper tabs implementation with Notifications as second tab
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created TEST_ prefixed users for push subscription testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Push notification feature fully tested. Backend endpoints at /api/push/* all working. Frontend UI shows Notifications tab in Security Settings dialog (accessible via nav-security button on mobile). Note: Actual push delivery cannot be tested in headless browser due to permission restrictions, but all API endpoints and UI elements verified working. VAPID keys are configured in backend/.env. Service worker handles push events with proper notification display.
notes: Push notification sending to actual devices cannot be fully tested in headless browser environment, but API endpoints for subscription management are verified working. The frontend correctly shows 'Notifications Blocked' message in headless mode which is expected behavior.
